acceptance_criteria_met: AC-1: Pending job transitions to transcribing - processPendingJobs and processJob functions implemented
AC-2: Successful transcript fetch completes job - status transitions to completed with transcriptId
AC-3: Transcript stored in videoTranscripts table - storeTranscript mutation implemented
AC-4: No captions changes status to no_captions - status transition handled
AC-5: Fetch error changes status to failed - error handling with errorMessage
AC-6: Failed job retries with exponential backoff - retry logic with 2^retryCount backoff
AC-7: Max retries marks job permanently failed - max 3 retries before permanent failure
AC-8: Multiple jobs processed with staggered delays - 2 second stagger between jobs
